title: SLA Window
description: Service-level commitment a seller declares for a given action. Optional throughout: absence means no commitment, not zero commitment — buyers querying SLA fields via #4425's `requires` predicate grammar MUST compose with `present` to avoid silently matching sellers who never declared one. Durations are ISO 8601 duration strings (e.g., `PT4H`, `PT24H`, `P1D`). Predicate evaluators that compare durations MUST normalize before comparison; `P1D` and `PT24H` are equal.

response_max.description: Maximum time from when the buyer issues the action to when the seller acknowledges receipt (mode-appropriate: synchronous response for self_serve, tolerance decision for conditional_self_serve, or queue ack for requires_approval). ISO 8601 duration.

completion_max.description: Maximum time from buyer issuing the action to the seller completing it (mutation applied, proposal finalized, approval resolved). ISO 8601 duration.
